en: Finchek, who knows what round, but do it with me and tell me how you say the following words.
I am from eastern Kentucky in the Appalachian Mountains. Where are you from? I'm from Wisconsin.
Let's go. Yogurt. Yogurt. Crisp. Crisp. Aluminum. Aluminum. Oregano. Oregano. Theater. Theater.
Progress. Progress. Foil. Foil. Airplane. Airplane. Tuesday. Tuesday. Herb. Herb. Basil.
Basil. Vitamin. Vitamin. Bald. Bald. Lion. Lion. Lion. Lion. Lion. Thanks for playing along.
